data.body: Already DELIVERED before this epic's execution by commit 2c66b1c7 'real layered layout in the serializer (no overlaps, docked edges, expanded sub-processes)'. bpmn.py is byte-identical between main and the epic branch. Verified all ACs on roundtrip-demo.yaml: 20 shapes at distinct positions (no overlap), 5 expanded sub-processes (loop/map/branch bodies inline), 15 edges all with >=2 docked waypoints (source right edge -> target left edge). Pinned by the existing test test_layout_has_no_overlaps_edges_and_expanded_subprocesses (asserts no-overlap + edges + expanded children inside parent). No new code required.
